mapper.select: SELECT id, email, name ,profile, password , authority FROM USERS U JOIN user_credentials UC ON U.ID = UC.USER_ID JOIN USER_AUTHORITY UA ON U.ID = UA.USER_ID WHERE UPPER(EMAIL) = UPPER(#{email})
mapper.insert:
SELECT SQE_USERS_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS (ID, EMAIL, NAME) VALUES (#{id}, #{email}, #{name})

INSERT ALL
INTO USER_AUTHORITY (USER_ID, AUTHORITY) VALUES (#{userId}, #{role})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, name ,profile, password , authority FROM USERS U JOIN user_credentials UC ON U.ID = UC.USER_ID JOIN USER_AUTHORITY UA ON U.ID = UA.USER_ID WHERE U.ID = #{id}
